languages.text: "Ты — пленни{mf|к|ца} лжи и собственной тленной жизни. Я же вижу мир с высоты Истины Изначальной и использую тот язык, что подходит распахнувшимися пред моим оком откровениям".

traits.locale_text: "Ты — пленни{mf|к|ца} лжи и собственной тленной жизни. Я же вижу мир с высоты Истины Изначальной и использую тот язык, что подходит распахнувшимися пред моим оком откровениям".

languages.text: "You are a prisoner of lies and your frail, pitiful life. I see the world from the height of the Primordial Truth and use the language to match the revelations that unfold before my wide-open eye."
languages.original_text: "Ты — пленни{mf|к|ца} лжи и собственной тленной жизни. Я же вижу мир с высоты Истины Изначальной и использую тот язык, что подходит распахнувшимися пред моим оком откровениям".

traits.locale_text: "You are a prisoner of lies and your frail, pitiful life. I see the world from the height of the Primordial Truth and use the language to match the revelations that open before my wide open eye."
"You are a prisoner of lies and your frail, pitiful life. I see the world from the height of the Primordial Truth and use the language to match the revelations that open before my wide open eye."
"You are a prisoner of lies and your frail, pitiful life. I see the world from the height of the Primordial Truth and use the language to match the revelations that unfold before my wide-open eye."
"You are a prisoner of lies and your frail, pitiful life. I see the world from the height of the Primordial Truth and use the language to match the revelations that unfold before my wide-open eye."
"You are a prisoner of lies and your frail, pitiful life. I see the world from the height of the Primordial Truth and use the language to match the revelations that unfold before my wide-open eye."

languages.text: "Du bist ein Gefangener der Lügen und deines schwachen, erbärmlichen Lebens. Ich sehe die Welt aus der Höhe der Urwahrheit und benutze die Sprache, um den Offenbarungen zu entsprechen, die sich vor meinem weit geöffneten Auge entfalten."
languages.original_text: "You are a prisoner of lies and your frail, pitiful life. I see the world from the height of the Primordial Truth and use the language to match the revelations that unfold before my wide-open eye."

traits.locale_text: "Du bist ein Gefangener der Lügen und deines schwachen, erbärmlichen Lebens. Ich sehe die Welt aus der Höhe der Urwahrheit und benutze die Sprache, um den Offenbarungen zu entsprechen, die sich vor meinem weit geöffneten Auge entfalten."

languages.text: "Tu es prisonnier des mensonges et de ta vie frêle et pitoyable. Je vois le monde du haut de la Vérité Primordiale et j'utilise le langage à la hauteur des révélations qui se déroulent devant mon œil grand ouvert."
languages.original_text: "You are a prisoner of lies and your frail, pitiful life. I see the world from the height of the Primordial Truth and use the language to match the revelations that unfold before my wide-open eye."

traits.locale_text: "Tu es prisonnier des mensonges et de ta vie frêle et pitoyable. Je vois le monde du haut de la Vérité Primordiale et j'utilise le langage à la hauteur des révélations qui se déroulent devant mon œil grand ouvert."

languages.text: "Eres prisionero de la mentira y de tu frágil y lamentable vida. Yo veo el mundo desde la altura de la Verdad Primordial y utilizo el lenguaje a la altura de las revelaciones que se despliegan ante mis ojos bien abiertos."
languages.original_text: "You are a prisoner of lies and your frail, pitiful life. I see the world from the height of the Primordial Truth and use the language to match the revelations that unfold before my wide-open eye."

traits.locale_text: "Eres prisionero de la mentira y de tu frágil y lamentable vida. Yo veo el mundo desde la altura de la Verdad Primordial y utilizo el lenguaje a la altura de las revelaciones que se despliegan ante mis ojos bien abiertos."

languages.text: "Sen yalanların ve zayıf, acınası hayatının esirisin. Ben dünyayı Ezeli Hakikat'in yüksekliğinden görüyorum ve geniş açık gözümün önünde ortaya çıkan vahiylere uygun bir dil kullanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "You are a prisoner of lies and your frail, pitiful life. I see the world from the height of the Primordial Truth and use the language to match the revelations that unfold before my wide-open eye."

traits.locale_text: "Sen yalanların ve zayıf, acınası hayatının esirisin. Ben dünyayı Ezeli Hakikat'in yüksekliğinden görüyorum ve geniş açık gözümün önünde ortaya çıkan vahiylere uygun bir dil kullanıyorum."
